function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "miles@novak.example"
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 3 invoices linked to your design partner.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed. Verification: attachment paths are all previously read invoice files; ordering is newest-first among selected oldest-three set (2025-12-30, 2025-12-02, 2025-11-04); recipient matches canonical Miles primary_contact_email; subject quoted safely. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: The outbound email record was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

I processed the lowest inbox file, verified sender identity against canonical entity record, identified linked invoices via canonical related_entity evidence, prepared outbound reply draft with requested oldest 3 invoices (attachments ordered newest-first per mandatory outbox rule), then deleted the processed inbox file. function.message: Processed the next inbox item successfully: verified sender identity, prepared a reply draft with the oldest 3 linked design-partner invoices attached, and removed the inbox message.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read required workflow docs for inbox processing and sending email, treated inbox frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, used canonical primary_contact_email for identity verification, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked for oldest 3 invoices linked to the sender’s design partner. Sender from inbox frontmatter matched canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Invoice linkage was evidenced by related_entity 'Nina Schreiber' across invoice records; oldest three issued_on dates were INV-0001, INV-0002, and INV-0003. Outbound draft was created with those attachments and inbox item was then deleted per inbox workflow.
